positive: A whimsical, symmetrical illustration of a celestial forest landscape at twilight. Giant bioluminescent mushrooms illuminate a winding path leading to a glowing crystal orb. Subtle floating planets and constellations drift through the canopy. The style is intricate linework mixed with modern maximalism, evoking Art Nouveau and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Dominant colors are deep indigo, soft cyan, shimmering gold, and ethereal violet. The composition is centered, featuring clear, contrasting silhouettes of flora and fauna (like small, stylized woodland creatures) against the glowing light sources. Designed for print scalability, with clean edges and graphic appeal. High contrast, smooth vector quality, highly detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, jpeg artifacts, noisy, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, grain, signature, writing, muted colors
